title: Lucid Group Investor Relations - Press Releases and Financial Reports
text: Lucid's investor relations website provides official earnings announcements, financial reports, SEC filings, and investor updates. Archive of press releases documents company developments from IPO through 2026. Official earnings documents provide audited financial statements and detailed disclosures. SEC filings include 10-Q quarterly reports and 10-K annual reports with management discussion sections. The IR site is definitive source for official company information and guidance. Historical press releases document major milestones including Gravity launch, funding announcements, and strategic partnerships.
